introSection: Crazy Roller Coaster was a steel roller coaster located at Nanhu Amusement Park in Baiyun, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Arrow Dynamics started project on the coaster, but filed for bankruptcy. However, Vekoma finished the project of the coaster.

The Crazy Roller Coaster was closed for less than a year before it was removed. The station and some of the track were removed, but the rest are abandoned.

fullText:
Crazy Roller Coaster was a steel roller coaster located at Nanhu Amusement Park in Baiyun, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China.

Arrow Dynamics started project on the coaster, but filed for bankruptcy. However, Vekoma finished the project of the coaster.

The Crazy Roller Coaster was closed for less than a year before it was removed. The station and some of the track were removed, but the rest are abandoned.
